description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for C/C++ CI on Linux cross-compilation for arm64. The workflow triggers on push events and runs on an ubuntu-latest environment. It checks out the code, installs necessary packages, sets up depot tools, fetches the WebRTC repository, builds it in Debug and Release modes using CMake and Clang, packages the build with CPack, and uploads the artifact. If the workflow is triggered by a tag, it also creates a GitHub release with the artifact.
